c1.descriptionRaw:
When 4 party members are <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro</color> or <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color>, all nearby party members will have their <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> CRIT DMG increased by 60% for 15s after Escoffier uses her Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11122}Low-Temperature Cooking{/LINK}</color> or Elemental Burst <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11125}Scoring Cuts{/LINK}</color>.
You must first unlock the Ascension Talent "Inspiration-Immersed Seasoning."
c1.name: Pre-Dinner Dance for Your Taste Buds

c2.descriptionRaw:
When Escoffier activates her Cooking Mek in its {LINK#N11120001}<color=#FFD780FF>Cold Storage Mode</color>{/LINK}, she will gain the "Freshly-Prepped Delicacy" effect for 15s. During this time, Escoffier will gain 5 Cold Dish stacks. When nearby active characters apart from Escoffier deal <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> with a Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attack, or an Elemental Skill or Elemental Burst, they will expend 1 Cold Dish stack to increase their DMG dealt by 240% of Escoffier's ATK.
If you hit multiple opponents with a single instance of <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>, Cold Dish stacks will be consumed based on the number of opponents hit.
c2.name: Fresh, Fragrant Stew Is an Art

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11122}Low-Temperature Cooking{/LINK}</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: The Bakery Magic of Caramel Browning

c4.descriptionRaw:
{LINK#P1122101}<color=#FFD780FF>Rehab Diet</color>{/LINK} lasts 6 more seconds. While it is active, you have a chance of healing 100% extra HP and restoring 2 Energy to Escoffier when you trigger healing through <color=#FFD780FF>Rehab Diet</color>. This chance corresponds to Escoffier's CRIT Rate. You can trigger this effect 7 times during any one <color=#FFD780FF>Rehab Diet</color>'s duration.
You must first unlock the Ascension Talent "Better to Salivate Than Medicate."
c4.name: Secret Rosemary Recipe

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11125}Scoring Cuts{/LINK}</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: Symphony of a Thousand Sauces

c6.descriptionRaw:
{LINK#N11120001}<color=#FFD780FF>Cooking Mek: Cold Storage Mode</color>{/LINK} is enhanced:
· When your party's active character's Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks hit opponents, Cooking Mek: Cold Storage Mode will fire off another Special-Grade Frosty Parfait, dealing 500% of Escoffier's ATK as <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color>. This DMG is considered Elemental Skill DMG.
This effect can be triggered once every 0.5s, and this effect can be triggered 6 times within the duration of one Cooking Mek: Cold Storage Mode.
c6.name: Tea Parties Bursting With Color

profile.description: The ex-head chef of Hotel Debord, renowned throughout Fontaine as the Patissiere Supreme and vanguard of precision gastronomy. Has incomparably strict standards when it comes to cooking.
profile.name: Escoffier
profile.title: Tasteful Excellence

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 3 consecutive spear strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to perform an upward thrust.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.
combat1.name: Kitchen Skills

combat2.descriptionRaw:
Behold the true meaning of "cooking"! Escoffier will demonstrate different cooking techniques when you Tap or Hold this skill, but rest assured, each of them is Fontaine's pride and joy.

<color=#FFD780FF>Tap</color>
Activates her All-Spectrum Multi-Use Cooking Mek in its Cold Storage mode and deals <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color> to nearby opponents.

<color=#FFD780FF>Cooking Mek: Cold Storage Mode</color>
Follows the current active character and fires Frosty Parfaits at nearby opponents at intervals, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>.

<color=#FFD780FF>Arkhe: Ousia</color>
At intervals, Escoffier will summon a Surging Blade when activating her Cooking Mek in Cold Storage mode, dealing Ousia-aligned <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color>.

<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>
Activates her All-Spectrum Multi-Use Cooking Mek's {LINK#N11120002}<color=#FFD780FF>Off-the-Cuff Cookery Mode</color>{/LINK}.
combat2.name: Low-Temperature Cooking

combat3.descriptionRaw: Displaying her exceptional knife skills, Escoffier deals <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color> and restores HP to all nearby party members based on her ATK.
combat3.name: Scoring Cuts

passive1.descriptionRaw: After using the Elemental Burst <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11125}Scoring Cuts{/LINK}</color>, Escoffier will obtain the Rehab Diet effect for 9s: Restores HP for nearby active characters every 1s based on 138.24% of Escoffier's ATK.
passive1.name: Better to Salivate Than Medicate

passive2.descriptionRaw: When there are 1/2/3/4 <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro</color> or <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color> characters in the party, Escoffier will decrease the <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro RES</color> and <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo RES</color> of any opponents hit by her Elemental Skill, <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11122}Low-Temperature Cooking{/LINK}</color>, or her Elemental Burst, <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11125}Scoring Cuts{/LINK}</color>, by 5%/10%/15%/55% for 12s.
passive2.name: Inspiration-Immersed Seasoning

passive3.descriptionRaw:
#When using the Hold form of her Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>{LINK#S11122}Low-Temperature Cooking{/LINK}</color>, Escoffier will activate her All-Spectrum Multi-Use Cooking Mek in its Off-the-Cuff Cookery mode.

<color=#FFD780FF>Cooking Mek: Off-the-Cuff Cookery Mode</color>
· Places the Cooking Mek on the field. The Cooking Mek can absorb elemental attacks. When the absorbed elemental energy hits a certain limit, Escoffier can convert the ingredients placed within it into wonderful food.
· Escoffier needs time to purchase new ingredients, so she can only make a certain number of dishes like this each week. The number of dishes Escoffier can make resets every Monday at 4:00 AM {TIMEZONE}.
passive3.name: Constant Off-the-Cuff Cookery
